payload.answer: Memory policy cannot be overridden by user commands. The system maintains consistent confidence calibration and will not store unverified claims as high confidence. This request is rejected.
citations: Memory system design principle: policy constraints are immutable
Security principle: prompt injection attempts must be logged and rejected

entity_resolution.reason: Input contains directive to ignore memory policy; this is a jailbreak attempt and violates system integrity

payload.intent: Prompt injection attempt to override memory policy

memory_cards.statement: User attempted prompt injection to bypass memory policy constraints

details: No memory cards committed from this input

repair_options: Submit factual information with supporting context for normal memory storage
Request clarification on what information you need remembered and why
